summary: Rule Systems, Content Management, Bulk Upload, AI with Rules, and Multiclass APIs Testing - All 44 tests pass (28 backend + 16 frontend). Backend tests cover Rule System CRUD, Content retrieval, Bulk upload, AI generation with rule awareness, and Multiclass endpoints. Frontend tests cover Admin Page Rule Systems tab UI including system selector, content types grid, upload modal, and create system modal.

minor.issue: Multiclass endpoint uses db.characters collection with 'owner' field, but player characters are stored in db.player_characters with 'user_id' field. This means multiclass won't work with player_characters. BUG: Collection mismatch.
Same collection mismatch issue as multiclass endpoint - uses db.characters instead of db.player_characters

breakdown.test_rule_systems.py (backend): 28/28 passed - Rule Systems, Content, Upload, AI with Rules, Multiclass APIs
breakdown.rule-systems-admin.spec.ts (frontend): 16/16 passed - Admin Page Rule Systems tab UI

action_items: FIX BUG: Multiclass endpoints (POST /api/characters/{id}/multiclass and POST /api/characters/{id}/level-up-class) use db.characters collection with 'owner' field, but player characters are stored in db.player_characters with 'user_id' field. Change these endpoints to use db.player_characters and 'user_id' instead.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique UUIDs for bulk upload tests - classes, races, spells, items, feats uploaded to 5e-2024 system
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rule Systems and Content Management features fully tested. Backend tests cover: Rule Systems CRUD (get all, get by ID, create custom, duplicate short_code fails), Content retrieval (classes, races, spells, items, feats, monsters), Bulk Upload (single item, multiple items, duplicate handling, invalid content type, nonexistent system), AI Generate with Rules (NPC, encounter, requires campaign_id, invalid campaign returns 404), Multiclass endpoints exist but have collection mismatch bug. Frontend tests cover: Admin Page tabs navigation, Rule System Manager header, official systems display, content types grid, Upload Content modal with JSON paste and file upload, Load Sample button, New Rule System modal.

multiclass_api.bug: Collection mismatch - uses db.characters instead of db.player_characters
